user_request_mode: per-case explicit request string from manifests/ocd_gmae_subset24_manifest.csv
notes: Recovery config for Gemini 2.5 Pro on the OCD-GMAE Step B3 ablation reruns.
Uses OpenRouter's official API endpoint instead of AiHubMix.
The target model is google/gemini-2.5-pro, matching OpenRouter model naming.
API key is read from the OPENROUTER_API_KEY environment variable.
The MACE settings stay aligned with the locked benchmark settings: cpu + small + float32 + no dispersion.
